task.title: Divide two numbers
task.shortdesc: Get division result using the CALC app.

context.p: This task explains how to divide two numbers using the CALC app.

result.p: The result from the division is displayed on the screen.

example.title: Dividing two numbers
example.p: To divide two numbers, enter 6 ÷ 3. The result is 2.

note.p: You cannot divide a number by zero. The CALC app displays an error when the second number is 0.
